nasb.text: And I looked, and behold, sinews were on them, and flesh grew and skin covered them; but there was no breath in them.

esv.text: And I looked, and behold, there were sinews on them, and flesh had come upon them, and skin had covered them. But there was no breath in them.

cnv.text: 我觀看，見骸骨生了筋，長了肉，又有皮包在上面，只是它們裡面還沒有氣息。

ccb.text: 我又发现骨头上有了筋，长了肉，包上了皮，只是还没有气息。
